description: Create a two-column content slide on the levers of digital transformation with a left-side radial process diagram and right-side explanatory bullet list.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: After digitalization of the consumer sphere, Digital Transformation is permeating all areas of the economy – Taking effect via four levers

steps.label: Digital data
steps.sub: Data-based routing; Wearables; Demand forecasts; Predictive maintenance; Big Data

steps.label: Automation
steps.sub: Robotics; Drones; Autonomous vehicles; Artificial Intelligence; Additive manufacturing

steps.label: Digital customer access
steps.sub: Fourth-party logistics; Infotainment; E-commerce; Social networks; Mobile Internet apps

steps.label: Connectivity
steps.sub: Broadband; Pure digital products; Remote maintenance; Internet of Things; Cloud computing; Smart factory

items.text: For consumers, digitalization – e.g. in the form of e-commerce, mobile internet and social media – has long since been part and parcel of everyday life. Now, Digital Transformation, i.e. the seamless, end-to-end connectivity of all areas of the economy, brings fundamental change to business. Digital Transformation takes effect via four levers:
Digital data. Capturing, processing and analyzing huge amounts of data allows better predictions and decisions to be made
Automation. Combining traditional technologies with Artificial Intelligence is increasingly giving rise to systems that work autonomously
Connectivity. Interconnecting the entire value chain and products via networks to synchronize supply chains and shorten both production lead times and innovation cycles
Digital customer access. The (mobile) internet gives new intermediaries direct access to customers offering choice, transparency and new services
